name: Santo Stefano al Mare
character: Blue Flag pebble, municipal free beach
blurb: The quietest beach in this band: fine white pebble, Blue Flag water quality record, and a genuinely free municipal beach with street parking 100 m away. Because it sits at 62 minutes from Finale, it only makes sense if the itinerary already has a reason to be in this corridor. Seafront trattorias are on the lungomare.
